title: Investigation Launched into Deportations Following Prison Sentences
detail: Federal investigation initiated into ICE practices regarding deportation of individuals immediately after completing prison sentences. The probe examines due process concerns and potential violations of legal protections for individuals who may have established ties to communities or have pending legal cases. Civil rights organizations have raised concerns about the systematic nature of these post-incarceration deportations and their impact on families and rehabilitation efforts.

media.caption: Investigation into ICE deportation practices after prison sentences
